problem id: 738f4928
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11001111 -> 00000111
  01011111 -> 00000101
  01110001 -> 01000101
  11101010 -> 10101011
  01100001 -> 10000101
  00111111 -> 00000100
  10000101 -> 00010110
  01011100 -> 00010001

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 10010101
